seo.title: How to Trade the 3 White Soldiers
seo.description: The Three White Soldiers is a powerful bullish reversal pattern that signals a shift from selling pressure to strong buying momentum. This article explains how to identify, confirm, and trade the pattern effectively, along with its advantages and limitations.
